name: Buy My Boss
original_name: ฉันซื้อเจ้านายกิน
overview: Recent graduate Manfan is facing numerous problems: her family's bankrupt; she's been dumped; everything's gone downhill, dragged down to the abyss. Wanting nothing more than some release, she hires an enchanting escort named Araya who reassures her that good things are coming. Who would've have thought that later, when she would take on and important job and meet her boss Issara, she would come to learn that Araya and Issara are one and the same?

trailers.title: OFFICIAL TEASER | BUY MY BOSS | FRT ENTERTAINMENT 2025
